nodes.title: Build prompt
nodes.purpose: Assembles the copyable prompt for a recipe step by substituting the project's Pantry values and any approved upstream artifacts. This is what the user runs in their own AI.

files.reason: Builds the prompt text and the matching highlighted HTML from the recipe, Pantry, and artifacts.
Supplies the Pantry field values substituted into the prompt.

nodes.title: Run in the user's AI
nodes.purpose: The user pastes the prompt into their own AI tool and runs it. SousMeow performs no AI call itself — this step is deliberately outside the application, which is why no code implements it.
nodes.uncertainty: This step happens entirely in the user's own AI tool, outside SousMeow; there is no source to trace here.

nodes.title: Paste response
nodes.purpose: The user pastes the AI's output back into SousMeow, where it is escaped and stored as a new artifact version. Pasted content is always treated as untrusted.

files.reason: Handles the paste write transition and records the response as an artifact version.
Escapes the pasted (untrusted) content before it is stored or ever re-displayed.

nodes.title: Quality checks
nodes.purpose: The human confirms each of the recipe's quality checks against the pasted response. Structural evidence is offered, but a person makes the call.

files.reason: Parses the pasted response against the recipe's output contract to produce found/missing evidence.
Records which checks the user has confirmed.

nodes.uncertainty: ResponseParser is inferred-from-source; the contract-matching details were not fully line-traced.

nodes.title: Approve + version
nodes.purpose: Approving the step writes an immutable artifact version. Versions are append-only, so the approved result is preserved exactly.

files.reason: addVersion is append-only; approve/reopen and confirmed checks are enforced here.

nodes.title: Export kit
nodes.purpose: Once every step is approved, the project can be exported as a self-contained kit: numbered Markdown files plus an offline kit.html reader.

files.reason: Builds the export zip from the approved artifacts and the Pantry.
The export page and build gate that requires all steps approved before a kit can be produced.

edges.label: emits copyable prompt
edges.explanation: Build-prompt emits a fully substituted, copyable prompt; the user runs it in their own AI tool, because SousMeow never calls an AI itself.

files.reason: Produces the exact prompt text the user copies out.

edges.label: receives pasted output
edges.explanation: Paste-response receives the AI's output back from the user and stores it, escaped, as a new artifact version.

files.reason: Accepts the pasted text and writes it as an artifact version.
Escapes the untrusted paste on the way in.

edges.label: advances to review
edges.explanation: After a response is stored, the Runner advances the step to its review state where the quality checks are confirmed.

files.reason: Enforces strict step ordering: review becomes available only after a paste exists.

edges.label: unlocks approval
edges.explanation: When every quality check is confirmed, the Runner allows approval, which writes the immutable artifact version.

files.reason: Blocks approval until the checks for the step are confirmed.

edges.label: enables export
edges.explanation: Once all steps are approved, the export gate opens and the kit is built from the approved artifact versions.

files.reason: The build gate that refuses to export until every step is approved.
Reads the approved artifacts to assemble the export.
